title: Hyperparameter Tuning Path
description: Build fluency in Hyperparameter Tuning inside Representation Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Data2Vec (unified SSL)
steps.summary: Data2Vec (unified SSL) belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Hyperparameter Tuning. It sits inside Representation Learning / Hyperparameter Tuning. Start after Data2vec and Unified Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Data2vec

steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Contextual Prompt Padding
steps.summary: Contextual Prompt Padding belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Hyperparameter Tuning. It sits inside Representation Learning / Hyperparameter Tuning. Start after Padding.
